hints.title: Gentle nudge
hints.text: The shortest answer starts on the top row and runs left across the corner.

hints.title: Direction clue
hints.text: One six-letter word runs from the top row down the right edge.

hints.title: Almost there
hints.text: The longest answer starts on Q and bends through the lower-right letters.

explanation: The June 25 Wend board uses every open letter exactly once: TOY clears the top-left edge, RACK clears the bottom center, SPIRAL runs across the top-right into the right edge, AUCTION bends down the left side, and QUANTITY starts at Q before turning through the lower-right letters.
quickHint: Start with TOY on the top row, then use the long Q path last.
fastTip: Clear TOY and RACK first; they are constrained edge paths and reduce the remaining route quickly.
commonMistake: Do not send AUCTION through the center U. That U belongs to QUANTITY.
difficultyNote: Medium because repeated A, U, T, and I letters make several tempting false turns.
